columns.extraction_plan: The control arm is defined as "standard of care (androgen deprivation therapy; docetaxel 75 mg/m² intravenously for six cycles with prednisolone 10 mg orally once per day allowed from Dec 17, 2015)" in the Methods section on page 1. It is also referred to as "standard of care (control group)" in the Randomisation and masking section on page 3. In Table 1 (pages 5 and 6), it is listed as "Standard of care" with sample sizes (n=502 for Abiraterone trial, n=454 for Abiraterone and Enzalutamide trial).
